xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
## Translations for the livetables column titles extension.repository.emptyvalue= extension.repository.name=Name extension.repository.summary=Summary extension.repository.type=Type extension.repository.category=Category extension.repository.authors=Authors extension.repository.doc.creationDate=Created On extension.repository.doc.date=Last Modified extension.repository.rating=Rating extension.repository.installedCount=Installs
## Administration UI admin.repository=Extension Repository
## Support repository.support.createsupporter=Register
## Supporters repository.supporter.sheet.description=This page controls how ExtensionSupporter pages are displayed in both view and edit modes. repository.supporter.sheet.noObject=The current page doesn't have the expected ExtensionSupporter object. repository.supporter.sheet.createplan=Add
repository.supporter.sheet.plans=Plans
ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_emptyvalue= ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_doc.title=Name ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_summary=Summary ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_url=URL ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_email=Email ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_content=Details ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_active=Active
## Support plans repository.supportplan.sheet.description=This page controls how ExtensionSupportPlan pages are displayed in both view and edit modes. repository.supportplan.sheet.noObject=The current page doesn't have the expected ExtensionSupportPlan object. repository.supportplan.sheet.supportedExtensions=Supported extensions
ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_emptyvalue= ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_doc.title=Name ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_supporter=Supporter ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_summary=Summary ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_url=URL ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_content=Details ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_active=Active ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_paying=Paying
## Extension sheet repository.extension.sheet.name=Name repository.extension.sheet.type=Type repository.extension.sheet.category=Category repository.extension.sheet.summary=Summary repository.extension.sheet.authors=Authors repository.extension.sheet.rating=Rating repository.extension.sheet.title=Extension sheet repository.extension.sheet.imported=Extension imported from repository repository.extension.sheet.updateExtension=Update extension repository.extension.sheet.developedBy=Developed by repository.extension.sheet.unknown=Unknown repository.extension.sheet.support=Support repository.extension.sheet.activeInstalls=Active Installs repository.extension.sheet.license=License repository.extension.sheet.installable=Installable with the Extension Manager repository.extension.sheet.documentation=Documentation repository.extension.sheet.sources=Sources repository.extension.sheet.issues=Issues repository.extension.sheet.download=Download v{0} repository.extension.sheet.toc=Table of contents repository.extension.sheet.documentationHelp=Documentation Help repository.extension.sheet.rulesIntro=Here are some rules to follow when contributing an extension: repository.extension.sheet.ruleSummary=Use a short summary. It's going to be displayed in the Extension livetable and ideally shouldn't take more than 1 line in that table. repository.extension.sheet.ruleImported=When an extension is imported everything from the source has priority over what's in that page so make sure you properly set the pom.xml or any other format you are importing from or disable auto update so that you can choose when to update and modify imported informations repository.extension.sheet.autoSync=Automatically synchronize the extension informations repository.extension.sheet.source=Source repository.extension.sheet.iconLocation=Display Icon Location repository.extension.sheet.iconLocationSyntax=Syntax: repository.extension.sheet.iconLocationLinkText=icon name repository.extension.sheet.showActiveInstalls=Show Active Installs repository.extension.sheet.supportPlans=Support plans repository.extension.sheet.description=Description repository.extension.sheet.prerequisites=Prerequisites & Installation Instructions repository.extension.sheet.customInstallationOnly=Custom installation only repository.extension.sheet.standardInstallationInstructions=Standard installation instructions repository.extension.sheet.customInstallationInstructions=Custom installation instructions repository.extension.sheet.versions=Versions repository.extension.sheet.releaseNotes=Release Notes repository.extension.sheet.dependencies=Dependencies repository.extension.sheet.dependenciesIntro=Dependencies for this extension ({0}): repository.extension.sheet.currentDownloads=Current Downloads repository.extension.sheet.addDownloads=Add Downloads repository.extension.sheet.addDownloadsSaveFirst=In order to add Download information for this extension, save this page first and edit it again. repository.extension.sheet.addDownloadsWarning=If you've made changes to this form, make sure to save the page before clicking on the links below since you would loose the information you entered otherwise. repository.extension.sheet.addDownloadsProcess=We don't have a slick UI yet to add new download versions or edit existing downloads version so for the moment it's a 2 step process: ## Sentences that contain a link keep the whole sentence in a single key (so translators stay free ## to reorder words and reposition the link). The link markup boundaries ([[ and >>target]]) are ## passed as parameters {0}/{1} built by the sheet (trusted code) following the standard XWiki ## pattern, and any untrusted data injected into the markup is escaped by the sheet. repository.extension.sheet.addDownloadsAttach=If you''re providing a new download, {0}attach the new version to this page{1} and come back to this page. Make sure you put the version in the filename (e.g. ubercoolmacro-1.0.xar). repository.extension.sheet.addDownloadsInfo=Add Download information for the new attachment by filing in a new {0}Extension Version{1}. Make sure to fill the data, especially the version and the link to the attachment. To link to an attachment, you can use {2}. repository.extension.sheet.currentDependencies=Current Dependencies repository.extension.sheet.addDependencies=Add Dependencies repository.extension.sheet.addDependenciesIntro=You can also associate dependencies to each version by filing in the following information in a new {0}Dependency{1}: repository.extension.sheet.addDependenciesVersion=Extension version is the version on which this dependency is assigned repository.extension.sheet.addDependenciesId=Dependency id is the identifier of the dependency extension on the repository where it is localed repository.extension.sheet.addDependenciesConstraint=Dependency version constraint is the version related information of the dependency. Can be a version (e.g. 1.0) or one or several ranges of versions based on Maven standard syntax (e.g. [1.0,) which mean at least 1.0) repository.extension.sheet.wrongObject=This class sheet must be applied on a document containing an ExtensionCode.ExtensionClass object
